content.body:
Neural JSON Knowledge Base with tag-based connections replaces flat MD context files.
Repo renamed copilot-core → leo-core. CLI command renamed to `leo` with new `migrate-kb`.

- .claude/kb/: schema.json (9 types), 19 docs (11 rules + 4 decisions/facts/feedback + 1 identity + 1 pattern + 1 skill + 1 new rule), 3 scripts (validate, build-index, check-stale)
- CLAUDE.md bootloader: 34-line self-load sequence from KB
- Hooks: PostToolUse validates KB docs on Write + rebuilds index
- CLI v0.2.0: `leo migrate-kb` for downstream project migration
- Design docs: architecture vision, neural mindmap, schema proposal, runtime flow, tree model exploration
- Old MD rules kept as deprecated fallback during migration (option B)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(kb): implement KB architecture — schema, 19 docs, scripts, hooks, CLI v0.2.0
content.summary:
